title: Zorbit Event Registry
description: Central registry of all platform events. Services must register their events here before publishing.

events.description: Emitted when a new user account is created.

dataFields.userId: string — short hash identifier of the new user (e.g. U-81F3)
dataFields.emailToken: string — PII vault token for the user's email (e.g. PII-92AF)
dataFields.roles: string[] — initial roles assigned to the user

events.description: Emitted when a user account is modified.

dataFields.userId: string — short hash identifier of the updated user
dataFields.changedFields: string[] — list of field names that were modified

events.description: Emitted when a user account is soft-deleted.

dataFields.userId: string — short hash identifier of the deleted user
dataFields.deletedBy: string — actor who performed the deletion

events.description: Emitted when a user authenticates and a new session is established.

dataFields.sessionId: string — short hash identifier of the session (e.g. SES-4F1A)
dataFields.userId: string — short hash identifier of the authenticated user
dataFields.authMethod: string — authentication method used (e.g. password, sso, mfa)

events.description: Emitted when a user session expires or is explicitly terminated.

dataFields.sessionId: string — short hash identifier of the expired session
dataFields.userId: string — short hash identifier of the user
dataFields.reason: string — reason for expiry (timeout, logout, revoked)
